// <auto-generated/>
#nullable enable

using Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection;

namespace TestAssembly
{
    /// <summary>
    /// Extension methods for registering services from TestAssembly.
    /// </summary>
    public static class TestAssemblyServiceCollectionExtensions
    {
        /// <summary>
        /// Registers all default services.
        /// </summary>
        public static IServiceCollection AddTestAssembly(this IServiceCollection services)
        {
            services.AddSingleton(typeof(global::TestNamespace.TestRequestHandler<>), typeof(global::TestNamespace.TestRequestHandler<>));
            services.AddSingleton<global::TestNamespace.ViewModel>((global::System.IServiceProvider sp) =>
            {
                var s0_m0 = sp.GetRequiredService<global::TestNamespace.IRequestHandler<global::TestNamespace.TestRequest<global::TestNamespace.Entity>, global::System.Collections.Generic.List<global::TestNamespace.Entity>>>();
                var s0 = new global::TestNamespace.ViewModel();
                s0.Initialize(s0_m0);
                return s0;
            });
            services.AddSingleton<global::TestNamespace.TestRequestHandler<global::TestNamespace.Entity>, global::TestNamespace.TestRequestHandler<global::TestNamespace.Entity>>();
            services.AddSingleton<global::TestNamespace.IRequestHandler<global::TestNamespace.TestRequest<global::TestNamespace.Entity>, global::System.Collections.Generic.List<global::TestNamespace.Entity>>>((global::System.IServiceProvider sp) =>
            {
                var s0 = sp.GetRequiredService<global::TestNamespace.TestRequestHandler<global::TestNamespace.Entity>>();
                var s1 = new global::TestNamespace.LoggingDecorator<global::TestNamespace.TestRequest<global::TestNamespace.Entity>, global::System.Collections.Generic.List<global::TestNamespace.Entity>>(s0);
                return s1;
            });

            return services;
        }
    }
}
